D-304; JUDGE STUART R. POLLAK; CLERK ANDREA CARNEY; ERIC THRONE, CSR ASSIGNED FRM D-1 FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PATIES STIPULATE. DEFENDANT SHALL VACATE 674 CHERRY ST, S.F. BY 5/31/00. IF DEFENDANT VACATES BY 5/31/00, PLAINTIFF WILL WAIVE BACK RENT AND DAMAGES AND FUTURE RENT FRM 9/1/99 THRU 5/31/00 AND WILL PAY COURT COSTS OF $350 AND WILL PROVIDE A VEHICLE FOR THE MOVE. ANY PROPERTY LEFT BEHIND IS DEEMED ABANDONED. SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE RETURNED TO DEFT WITH INTEREST. EACH PARTY TO PAY OWN ATTORNEY FEES. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO VACATE BY 5/31/00, PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE JUDGMENT ENTERED AND A WRIT OF POSSESSION ISSUED.
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 304
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, CASE SETTLED
